message:
fix(viz): InstallFlowViz step times sum to 20 min (matches h3 + ribbon)

Prior commit aligned the viz h3 and closing ribbon to "twenty minutes"
to match article copy. Individual step times still summed to 15 min
(5+5+3+2), creating a data/copy mismatch: a user reading the per-step
badges got 15, but the aggregate claim said 20.

Nudged step times to sum to 20:
  step 1 (frontier-model subscription) 5 → 7
  step 2 (desktop app install)         5 → 7
  step 3 (jsm.md subscription)         3 → 4
  step 4 (install the skill)           2 → 2 (unchanged)

Each bump is realistic for a non-technical user: pricing-tier research
+ card entry + confirmation email typically runs longer than 5 min; an
app download + sign-in with 2FA also tends past 5 min. Step 4 stays at
"~2 min" since it's literally one paste-and-approve.

bun tsc --noEmit clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
